A

AccessPoint - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP
Represents a physical Wi-Fi Access Point used for indoor positioning.
AccessPoint(String) - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
Constructs a new AccessPoint with the specified SSID.

C

calculatePosition(Map<String, Integer>, Map<String, AccessPoint>, boolean) - Static method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing.TrilaterationEngine
Calculates the 2D coordinates of the device based on real-time Wi-Fi measurements.
coeffA - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The quadratic coefficient (A) for the second-degree polynomial model.
coeffB - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The linear coefficient (B) for the second-degree polynomial model.
coeffC - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The constant term (C) for the second-degree polynomial model.

com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing - package com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing
 
CsvDataProcessor - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing
Processes CSV data containing RSSI measurements to calibrate Access Points.
CsvDataProcessor(List<String>, IOnProcessingCompleted) - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing.CsvDataProcessor
Constructs a new CsvDataProcessor.
CsvExporter - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc
Provides utility methods to export collected Wi-Fi measurements to a CSV file.
CsvExporter() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc.CsvExporter
 
CsvReader - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc
Provides utility methods for reading CSV files from the application's assets folder.
CsvReader() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc.CsvReader
 

D

DemoFragment - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning
Represents the main user interface for the indoor Wi-Fi positioning demonstration.
DemoFragment() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.DemoFragment
 

E

exportToDownloads(Context, String[], LinkedHashMap<Integer, Integer>, Map<String, Map<Integer, List<Integer>>>) - Static method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc.CsvExporter
Exports the recorded RSSI measurements to a CSV file in the device's Downloads folder.

I

IOnProcessingCompleted - Interface in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.interfaces
Callback interface used to notify when the RSSI data processing and Access Point calibration are completed.
IWiFiScanCompleted - Interface in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.interfaces
Callback interface used to deliver the results of a Wi-Fi scan operation.

M

MainActivity - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning
The main entry point of the application.
MainActivity() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.MainActivity
 

N

n - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The path loss exponent (used in the logarithmic model).

Called when the CSV data processing finishes successfully.

onWifiScanCompleted(String, int) - Method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.DemoFragment
Called when a new RSSI measurement is available for a specific Access Point.
onWifiScanCompleted(String, int) - Method in interface com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.interfaces.IWiFiScanCompleted
Called when a new RSSI measurement is available for a specific Access Point.

Called when a new RSSI measurement is available for a specific Access Point.

P

p_0 - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The reference RSSI value at 1 meter distance (used in the logarithmic model).

R

readCsvFromAssets(Context, String) - Static method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.misc.CsvReader
Reads the contents of a CSV file located in the application's assets folder.
run() - Method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing.CsvDataProcessor

S

setTargetSSID(String) - Method in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.BRs.WiFiReceiver
Sets a specific target SSID to filter the incoming scan results.
ssid - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The Service Set Identifier (network name) of the Access Point.

T

TrainingFragment - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning
Manages the training phase of the indoor positioning system.
TrainingFragment() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.TrainingFragment
 
TrilaterationEngine - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing
Provides utility methods to calculate the device's physical position using trilateration.
TrilaterationEngine() - Constructor for class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.processing.TrilaterationEngine
 

W

WiFiReceiver - Class in com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.BRs
Handles the reception of Wi-Fi scan results from the Android system.

Constructs a new WiFiReceiver.

X

x - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The physical X coordinate of the Access Point in the reference map.

Y

y - Variable in class com.wifigroup.indoorwifipositioning.AP.AccessPoint
The physical Y coordinate of the Access Point in the reference map.
